EMERALD v 1.01.3_1a
Nature Client

Nice job you found another secret

Combat

Aimbot

Automatically aims at the nearest entity

Range
.

The range that Aimbot will check

Target part
.
HEAD▼
HEAD
TORSO
LEFT ARM
RIGHT ARM
LEFT LEG
LEFT LEG

Target the spot part of the mob

Only tools
.

Aimbot should only exist if you are holding a tool

Additional tools
.

Custom blocks,items,tools you can add seperate by the use of "," and include the "minecraft:" "something:" depending on your mods

Require click on mob
.

Click on the mob to start tracking it

Vertical
.

Make aimbot only work vertically

Horizontal speed
.

The horizontal speed

Vertical speed
.

The vertical speed

Horizontal range
.

The horizontal range

Vertical range
.

The vertical range

Aimlock
.

Locks in completely no smoothing LOCKED IN PLACE BE A TRYHARD

Whitelisted mobs
.

Whitelisted mobs will not get tracked and ignored use "," to seperate and include the "minecraft:" "something:" depending on your mods

Blacklisted mobs
.

Blacklisted mobs will get tracked and NOT ignored use "," to seperate and include the "minecraft:" "something:" depending on your mods

Whitelisted players
.

Whitelisted players will not get tracked and ignored use "," to seperate and include the full username eg. "StupidAH67"

Blacklisted players
.

Blacklisted players will get tracked and NOT ignored use "," to seperate and include the full username eg. "StupidAH67"

Projectiles

Throw projectiles fast

Deflect speed
.

Speed of projectiles when you deflect them back

Deflect damage
.

Damage of projectiles when you deflect them back

Deflect lag spike size
.

Extremly OP you can lag servers with this option also

No move after deflect
.

If you are able to deflect the projectile it will be stuck in place

Throwing speed
.

Speed of projectile throw

Throw duplication
.

Duplicate how many projectiles you throw at the same time also this does not effect how many you have

Damage amount
.

OP Exploit that lets you set the damage of the projectiles and actually works on servers

Throwing cooldown
.

Speed of cooldown on projectiles

Max shown to you
.

This is an anti lag for projectiles

Lag spike size
.

Extremly OP you can lag servers with this option

Amplify sound
.

Make projectiles sound way louder RIP headphone users lol

No move
.

Projectiles stay in the air and dont move and still deal damage if something gets intact with it

Silent
.

Sends no packets true silence

Anti damage
.

Sends no packets true silence

Chest utils

Chest utils

No open anim
.

Nobody will see the chest being opened/closed

No sound
.

Nobody will hear the chest being opened/closed

Sound spam
.

You can annoy the FUCK out of your friends with this spamming the chest sound

Ghost
.

When taking an item repaces automaticaly with a ghost one

Dupe
.

Exploit that dupes the item in the chest when rentering it again VERY BUGGY

Keep open anim
.

Exploit that keeps the chest entity open but its very buggy first open the chest and quickly exit it only works if this is enabled

Kick from UI
.

Exploit that acts like a locked chest so when you open the chest it strait kicks you out of the ui and now evryone is affected by that chest glitch to fix it break & place the chest back

Triple chest glitch
.

To use this its very buggy first open ONE chest and close it after make it a double chest and open it there u go triple storage

Ghost inventory
.

Player inside the chest ui wont see items being moved or taken until they exit an reenter the chest they will see things changed ONLY WORK IF YOU ARE USING THE CHEST

Fake obstruct
.

Using a glitch to trick the chest being obstructed can be undone by placing a block on top of it and breaking it

Allow obstructed
.

Allows you to open chests obstructed by a block on top

Anti double
.

Can place chests without making them double next to eachother

Half double
.

Another cool glitch make a double chest and break a half of it done you have a glitched chest

Ghost double
.

Makes the chest invisible if made into a double chest still usable and clickable

Despawn double
.

OP exploit that if you turn or place next to a one chest when it coverts to double chest it dissapears and the items in it

Half double
.

Another cool glitch make a double chest and break a half of it done you have a glitched chest

Chunk corruption dub
.

EXTREMLY OP GLITCH make servers loose chunks turning into ghost chunks upon making a double chest

Hold key
.

You will have to hold the key you set and if you let go the module deactivates

Leash utils

Utilities for leashes

Leash anything PLAYERS?
.

Leash anything even players make them your good boy~

Leash not exploit
.

When trying to leash something on a fence for example the knot will be there but the mob wont be leashed also these are ghost knots

Leash wont break
.

OP Uses old bedrocks code the trick the leash to not break

Leash crash
.

Use the leash all option with this and you can crash players when trying to leash them

Leash urself
.

Why tf would you leash urself (you cant get out)

Leash safe
.

NOBODY CAN UNLEASH UR LEASH if its on fences

Leash sound spam
.

Only works if you are near the fence hovering it

Leash spam speed
.

Speed of spamming

Invisible knot
.

Invisible knot and you cant see it on blocks

Weird knot
.

Break the damn fence where the knot was on and it will stay in mid air

Weird knot crash
.

Break the damn fence where the knot was on and it will turn into a weird glitched falling block looking like part of a knot texture and when it places it crashes the server REALLY OP

Invisible leash
.

Invisible leash when leashing nobdy can see it

Leash max length
.

Max length until leash breaks in blocks

Leash spazm
.

Make the leash spazm the more you add the more it spazms

Leash size
.

Super OP blind people with a giant leash

.

Show name
.

.

.

.

.

Whitelisted mobs
.

Whitelisted mobs will not get tracked and ignored use "," to seperate and include the "minecraft:" "something:" depending on your mods

Blacklisted mobs
.

.

Opacity
.

Whitelisted players
.

Whitelisted players will not get tracked and ignored use "," to seperate and include the full username eg. "StupidAH67"

Blacklisted players
.

Blacklisted players will get tracked and NOT ignored use "," to seperate and include the full username eg. "StupidAH67"

Dont render random shit what else should I write here..

No particles
.

Remove particles

No falling blocks
.

Remove falling block entities

No item entities
.

Remove showing of items on the floor ( not reccomended )

No NPC mobs
.

No custom NPC models loaded

No fog render
.

No fog i guess kinda helpful

No smooth light
.

No smooth lighting ( only show the highest light level of the block and in nether for example only render 15,14,13,12 lighting )

No block shadows
.

May help idk removes the block shadow edges

No entity shadows
.

Remove the circle under enteties

No retards
.

Removes all players from your vision Why would you need to enable this? Is this for a challenge or ur just scared? skill issue btw

.

.

.

.

.

.

Enteties tracers

Show lines to entities

Line thickness
.

How fat is the line

Enteties
.

Entities will be put here leave blank for all to show here is an eg. minecraft:zombie[#00FF00 opti:255],minecraft:pig[#FF0000 opti:155] dynamic color features disable the color var

Dynamic color
.
.
Retry

Picks a random color from the mob and uses it as a tracer

Players
.

Players will be put here leave blank for all to show here is an eg. RANDOMNGA[#00FF00 opti:255],RANDOMNGA2[#FF0000 opti:155] dynamic color features disable the color var

Dnamic player color
.

Picks a random color from the player skin and uses it as a tracer

.

.

Changes item position Z on left hand

.

Changes item position X on right hand

.

.

.

.

Changes item rotation Y on left hand

.

Changes item rotation Z on left hand

Rotation 0-360 Right X
.

Changes item rotation X on right hand

.

Changes item rotation Y on right hand

.

Changes item rotation Z on right hand

Scale Left X
.

Changes item scale X on left hand

.

Changes item scale Y on left hand

.

Changes item scale Z on left hand

Scale Right X
.

Changes item scale X on right hand

Scale Right Y
.

Changes item scale Y on right hand

.

No char limit

Remove the character limit for chat

EVERYTHING (very buggy)
.

WARNING THIS IS VERY UNSTABE IT CHECKS THROUGH SERVERSIDED SERVER DATA TO FIND UI ELEMENTS TO UNLOCK CHAR LIMITS AND ALSO YOU CAN EXPERIENCE UI CORRUPTION OR WRONG TEXTURES

.

.

Fix 4 lines limit
.

Forces the sign hardcoded limit to break and can go over 4 lines which ends in glitchy results but creative ideas

2 in 1 glitch
.

An very old bedrock glitch that overlapped two texts at the same time and you had to press enter key two times for new line chars allowed are ABCDEFGHIJKLMNOPQRSTUVWXYZabcdefghijklmnopqrstuvwxyz0123456789/-+=[]() nothing else

Block pickup logger

EDUCATIONAL PURPOSES ONLY THIS IS A SERIOUS MODULE IT CAN LOG IPS AND INFO/PASSWORDS OF THE PLAYER IF YOU DONT KNOW WHAT YOU ARE DOING DO NOT TOUCH THIS MODULE

Method
.
1 ONGS▼
